name: audit-deps
description: Audit open dependabot PRs in this repo. Spawns one investigator per PR (each with a codebase-walk sub-agent), produces a comparison table with per-PR risk + recommendation, and proposes a merge order that minimizes rebase churn. Audit-only — stops at recommendations; user authorizes execution. Use when dependabot has stacked up multiple open PRs and you want a structured pass before merging.
